gitCommit.subject: infra(aws): protect datasink from destroy after merge
gitCommit.body:
infra(aws): protect datasink from destroy after merge

- block local and workflow destroy paths for the protected datasink stage
- keep datasink dev-like while enabling termination protection in deployment config
